features.title: Everything you need to
features.subtitle: Designed by tailors, for tailors. We've built the most intuitive platform to manage your craftsmanship and customer relationships.

crm.title: Smart Customer CRM
crm.desc: Store unlimited customer profiles with detailed measurement history, style preferences, and contact info.

tracking.title: Live Order Tracking
tracking.desc: Real-time status updates from 'Pending' to 'Delivered'. Automatic delivery date reminders keep you on schedule.

invoices.title: Digital Invoices
invoices.desc: Generate professional PDF invoices with one click. Send them directly to customers via WhatsApp or Email.

visuals.title: Visual References
visuals.desc: Attach reference photos and sample designs to every order. Never mix up a customer's vision again.

storage.title: Secure Cloud Storage
storage.desc: Your data is encrypted and backed up daily. Access your shop records from any device, anywhere in the world.

security.title: Data Security
security.desc: We use industry-standard encryption to keep your customer data and shop records safe and private.

analytics.title: Instant Analytics
analytics.desc: Track your revenue, pending payments, and order volume with a beautiful, real-time dashboard.

tracking.title: Easy Order Tracking
tracking.desc: Keep all your orders organized and never miss a delivery deadline again.

storage.desc: Securely store and access customer measurements from any device.

delivery.desc: Optimize your delivery process and keep customers informed with status updates.

workflow.title: Simple Digital Workflow

progress.title: Track Progress
progress.desc: Update status as you stitch. The dashboard shows you exactly what's due today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about LoopTailor and how it works.

items.a: LoopTailor is a smart tailoring management software designed for tailors and boutique owners to manage customer measurements, orders, token IDs, delivery tracking, and shop operations digitally without paper registers.
LoopTailor is built for tailors, tailoring shops, fashion boutiques, and stitching businesses that want to manage customers and orders efficiently using a digital system.
LoopTailor helps tailors organize measurements, track orders, assign token numbers, manage deliveries, and avoid manual record mistakes by keeping everything securely stored in one system.
Yes. LoopTailor securely saves customer measurements and order history so tailors can quickly access past records anytime.
Yes. LoopTailor supports multiple tailoring shops where each shop’s data stays separate and organized.
Yes. LoopTailor is designed for simplicity so even non-technical users can manage tailoring work easily.

items.q: Does LoopTailor work on mobile and web?
items.a: Yes. LoopTailor works on both mobile devices and web browsers, allowing shop owners to manage their business anywhere.

items.q: Why choose LoopTailor instead of paper registers?
items.a: LoopTailor saves time, reduces mistakes, improves customer management, and keeps records safe compared to traditional manual registers.

items.q: Looking for loop tailor, loptailor, or loop teler?
items.a: You've found the right place! LoopTailor (often searched as loop tailor or loptailor) is the leading digital management system for modern tailoring shops.

items.q: Is LoopTailor the best darzi software?
items.a: Yes, LoopTailor is widely considered the best darzi software for managing stitching orders, measurements, and customer records in a digital format.

items.q: Can I use LoopTailor as a boutique software?
items.a: Absolutely! LoopTailor is perfect boutique software, offering features for order tracking, measurement management, and customer relationship management.
